calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Oct-07-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Britta Peterson for petitioner Rhea Genthner, who was also present (via Zoom).
Kelly Walker, personal attorney for Rhea Genthner (via Zoom).
Jackie Garcia, interested party (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Second Amended Petition for Letters of Administration with Lost Will Annexed.

The Court noted it had reviewed the petition and supporting documents, and inquired as to whether there were any objections. No objections were raised.

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Lost Will Annexed. The lost will dated October 14, 2000, is admitted to probate. Rhea Genthner is appointed as the Administrator with will annexed with full authority. Bond is set at $650,000. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for April 20, 2027, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Cindee Mayfield; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
